title: adesmia elata
intro: Adesmia elata, also known as "Queñua", is a plant species native to South America, specifically in the Andean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Adesmia elata include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are believed to promote overall well-being.
